stories.headline: Armie Hammer's 'Citizen Vigilante' Secures Worldwide Distribution - Variety
stories.summary: Quiver has taken worldwide rights, excluding U.K., German-speaking territories, South Korea and Taiwan, to Armie Hammer’s 'Citizen Vigilante.'

stories.headline: Cara Delevingne Says She Dated Amber Heard Through Johnny Depp Divorce - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: "She was also entangled with other people," the British actress tells Louis Theroux on the broadcaster's latest podcast episode. "Well, with Elon [Musk]," he responds.
